name: ExtensionSlot_AppointmentType
title: R5: appointmentType
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Slot.appointmentType` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Slot.appointmentType` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Slot.appointmentType` 0..* `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `Slot.appointmentType` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4: `Slot.appointmentType` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Slot.appointmentType` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `Slot.appointmentType` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Slot.appointmentType` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.comment:
Element `Slot.appointmentType` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `Slot.appointmentType` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Slot.appointmentType` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
A slot may be allow multiple appointment types, but when booked, would only be used for one of the given appointment types.

element.short: The style of appointment or patient that may be booked in the slot (not service type)
element.definition: The style of appointment or patient that may be booked in the slot (not service type).
element.comment: A slot may be allow multiple appointment types, but when booked, would only be used for one of the given appointment types.
